javascript basics: JavaScript is a high-level, interpreted language for web development. Supports ES6+ features like arrow functions, classes, async/await, modules.
javascript dom: The DOM allows JS to manipulate HTML elements: document.getElementById('id').innerText = 'Hello'; document.querySelector('.class').style.color = 'red';
javascript async: Async programming uses Promises and async/await. Example: async function fetchData(){ const res = await fetch(url); const data = await res.json(); return data; }
javascript frameworks: React, Vue, Angular are popular JS frameworks for building dynamic web apps. Use state management and components for scalable apps.
python basics: Python is an interpreted, high-level language supporting OOP, functional programming, scripting. Example: print('Hello Python')
python data structures: Python has lists, dicts, sets, tuples. Example: my_list=[1,2,3]; my_dict={'a':1}; my_set={1,2}; tuple=(1,2)
python advanced: Decorators, generators, context managers, async/await, type hints, Pythonic idioms, data classes, list comprehensions.
c++ basics: C++ is compiled, high-performance. Supports OOP, templates, STL. Example: #include<iostream> int main(){ std::cout << 'Hello'; return 0; }
c++ advanced: Pointers, references, memory management, templates, inheritance, polymorphism, move semantics, RAII, smart pointers, STL algorithms.
java basics: Java runs on JVM, strongly typed OOP language. Example: public class Main { public static void main(String[] args){ System.out.println('Hello'); } }
java advanced: Generics, concurrency, streams, lambdas, design patterns (Singleton, Observer), Spring Boot for web apps.
html basics:
HTML structures web pages. Use tags like
,

,

. Semantic HTML improves accessibility.
css basics: CSS styles pages: selectors, flexbox, grid, transitions, animations. Example: div{display:flex;justify-content:center;}
css advanced: CSS variables, keyframe animations, responsive design, media queries, pseudo-elements (:before, :after), complex layouts.
sql basics: SQL manages relational databases: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE. Example: SELECT name FROM users WHERE age>18;
sql advanced: Joins, subqueries, indexes, transactions, normalization, views, stored procedures, triggers, performance optimization.
data structures: Arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, hash maps, heaps. Understand Big-O complexity.
algorithms: Sorting (quick, merge, bubble), searching (binary, DFS/BFS), dynamic programming, recursion, greedy algorithms.
apis: APIs allow software to communicate. Use fetch/axios in JS, requests in Python. RESTful and GraphQL patterns.
web development: Frontend: HTML/CSS/JS (+frameworks). Backend: Node.js, Django, Flask, Spring Boot. Databases: SQL/NoSQL. Full-stack integration.
machine learning: ML trains models to make predictions. Libraries: scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch. Concepts: supervised, unsupervised, regression, classification.
cloud computing: AWS, Azure, GCP provide storage, serverless functions, containers, VM instances, scaling solutions.
network basics: TCP/IP, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, client-server, sockets, REST APIs, WebSockets, SSL/TLS.
security basics: HTTPS, input sanitization, password hashing (bcrypt), JWT/OAuth2.0, CORS, XSS/SQL injection prevention.
math basics: Algebra, geometry, calculus, probability, statistics, linear algebra, discrete math, combinatorics.
physics basics: Mechanics, thermodynamics, electromagnetism, optics, quantum basics.
chemistry basics: Periodic table, bonding, reactions, stoichiometry, acids/bases, organic chemistry basics.
biology basics: Cell structure, genetics, evolution, human anatomy, ecosystems.
geography basics: Continents, countries, capitals, major rivers, mountains, timezones.
history basics: Major world events, civilizations, wars, revolutions, technological milestones.
finance basics: Budgeting, saving, investment types, stocks, bonds, crypto, compound interest.
example js file: console.log('Hello World'); function add(a,b){ return a+b; }
example java file: public class HelloWorld { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println('Hello World'); } }
writing email:
Use professional greeting, clear paragraphs, polite tone. Example: Dear [Name],

I hope this email finds you well...
writing essay: Start with introduction, body paragraphs, conclusion. Support arguments with evidence. Maintain formal tone.
current news: Dolores can summarize news from trusted sources (requires online API integration).
weather info: Dolores can provide local weather if location API is available.
tech updates: Dolores can explain the latest in tech trends, frameworks, programming news.
